summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of AriesHitX v3.5 dashboard - all major features working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Clipboard permission error overlay blocks interface after copy logs attempt
ui_bugs.details: Browser security restriction for clipboard access - not a code issue

passed_tests: Settings modal opens with correct size (90vw x 85vh) and two-column layout
All 10 required settings sections present (Premium, Interface, Features, Sounds, Screenshot, Auto Clicker, Notification, Proxy, Autofill, Telegram)
Gateway modal displays multiple gateways with functional ON/OFF toggles
Bin Library shows 5 categories (Amazon, Shopify, Stripe, PayPal, Braintree)
Bin Library categories expand showing providers with colored badges (VISA, MC, AMEX, DISC)
Use button auto-fills BIN input field (tested with 414720)
Grey toast notifications appear at bottom center with purple checkmark
Hover and click animations work on all tested buttons
Status toggle generates toast notification when activated
Fingerprint generation works with toast feedback
Modal close functionality works across all modals
